route.name: Pacific Coast Highway: Point Reyes Station to Santa Cruz

route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from routes/pacific-coast-highway-point-reyes-to-santa-cruz.gpx. Local GPX generated by stitching BRouter north-coast/PCH concept geometry to the existing SF-to-Santa-Cruz PCH GPX; Plan Ready geometry, not official turn-by-turn navigation.
route.description: PCH / Longer Highway 1 coastal corridor stitching the Marin/Point Reyes section into the existing San Francisco-to-Santa-Cruz PCH geometry.
route.surfaceMix: Mostly paved coastal routing with possible gravel connectors; road stress matters more than technical trail difficulty.
route.bestSeason: Broad-season coastal route outside storms; summer fog/wind, traffic, holiday congestion, and winter storm damage are key gates.

resources.water: Coastal services exist but exact hours/water points need verification.
resources.food: Point Reyes/Olema, Marin, SF, Pacifica, Half Moon Bay, Pescadero, Davenport, Santa Cruz services; hours unresolved.
resources.camping: Likely Marin/Point Reyes, Half Moon Bay, Butano/Pescadero, and Santa Cruz-area camp or lodging sequence; exact nights unresolved.
resources.toiletsShowers: Confirm by campground/service source before riding.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest bike shops before gate confirmation.
resources.longestGap: Measure from resolved geometry before gate confirmation.
